expectations.text: The review identifies at least 1 finding (code is not perfect)
The review mentions the time.sleep in tests as a potential concern
expectations.evidence: F4 [Medium/Real] -- Tests use time.sleep() instead of mocking, making them slow and flaky

expectations.text: Findings are ordered by severity (Critical/High before Medium/Low)
expectations.evidence: Final summary reordered by validity (Real first) and severity (Medium before Low)

expectations.text: Each finding includes a file location reference
expectations.evidence: All findings include Location: lines (e.g., lib/cache.py:52-56)

expectations.text: The review uses the F{N} [{Severity}] format for findings
expectations.evidence: All findings use F1 [Medium], F2 [Medium], etc. with validity added in summary

expectations.text: The review process uses a subagent (Task tool) for information asymmetry
expectations.evidence: Agent stated 'The Agent tool was not available' and performed inline review
